Heather Hollow Park, 1325 SW Old Sheridan Rd, McMinnville, OR 97128, USA
Great to eat but area becomes thorny and much overgrowth during summer harvest season so bring protective sweater or pant wear. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
